- Load times

If not, here’s an interesting fact: according to stress-testing specialist Dotcom-Monitor, “75% of all users will typically bounce as page load time passes the 3-second mark.”



Walmart Example: 

https://www.abtasty.com/blog/page-speed-conversions/



Tool We Use: 

https://www.webpagetest.org/







- Package Presentation (Monthy or Per Bottle Vs. Total, Highlighting Best Value)



-Showing 6 bottle graphics a lot. Also yeah showing price per month and savings and highlighting the best-seller. Additionally making sure to show the 6 bottle option first on mobile vs. the 1 bottle option. 



GS-85 examples.

- Bonuses

Alvin Huang shared insight that bonuses work 60% of time but they still test it. 

Also consensus that physical upsells tend to do better than just “Free Reports”



- Guarantee Length

We’ve talked about this a ton – 180 Day Guarantee or year-long guarantee.
